name: New Loan Origination Entry
steps: Navigate to Cornerstone > Lending > New Application
Enter borrower ID or create new borrower record via Customer Master
Select loan product type (operating/real-estate/equipment/livestock)
Enter loan terms: amount, rate type, term, payment frequency
Attach collateral records from Collateral Management module
Run automated compliance checks (FCA-614 series)
Submit to credit committee queue if amount exceeds officer authority
Generate commitment letter from Document Generation module
systemChecks: Duplicate borrower detection
Credit score auto-pull from bureau integration
Collateral lien search via UCC database
LTV ratio calculation against appraisal values
Rate validation against current published rate sheet

name: Loan Disbursement Processing
steps: Verify all pre-disbursement conditions are met in Conditions Tracking
Confirm collateral perfection: UCC filings recorded, mortgages recorded
Validate insurance coverage meets minimum requirements
Execute disbursement via ACH or wire from Cornerstone Treasury module
Post transaction to borrower loan account and general ledger
Generate disbursement confirmation and transmit to borrower
systemChecks: All condition precedent flags cleared
Collateral perfection status confirmed
Insurance verification current
Available commitment balance sufficient
Dual authorization for disbursements over $500,000

name: Payment Processing and Application
steps: Receive payment via ACH, check, or wire transfer
Match payment to borrower account via account number or borrower lookup
Apply payment per contractual waterfall: fees, interest, principal
Update amortization schedule and remaining balance
Generate payment receipt and post to borrower statement
Flag any partial payments or overpayments for review
systemChecks: Payment amount matches or exceeds minimum due
Account status validation (not in default, not charged off)
NSF/returned payment detection from banking integration
Delinquency status auto-update based on payment timing
Accrual reversal processing for delinquent accounts brought current

name: Quarterly Call Report Generation
steps: Initiate call report cycle from Cornerstone > Reporting > Regulatory
Run data integrity validation across all loan and financial modules
Generate Schedule A (Balance Sheet) from general ledger
Generate Schedule B (Income Statement) from revenue/expense accounts
Generate Schedule D (Loan Portfolio Analysis) from lending module
Review exception report for manual adjustments
Submit to Central Farm Bank via FCS Data Exchange portal
Archive final report package with supporting workpapers
systemChecks: Trial balance reconciliation zero-check
Loan-level to portfolio-level balance tie-out
Allowance calculation validation against model
Capital ratio computation and threshold check
Prior quarter comparison with variance flagging

name: Collateral Valuation and Monitoring
steps: Access Cornerstone > Collateral Management > Valuation Queue
Identify collateral items due for revaluation per policy schedule
Order appraisal or conduct desk review based on loan amount and risk
Enter updated valuation into collateral record with source documentation
Recalculate LTV ratios for all associated loans
Generate margin deficiency notices if LTV exceeds policy limits
Update risk rating if collateral position materially changed
systemChecks: Appraisal age validation (must be within policy window)
Appraiser license verification against state registry
Automated LTV recalculation across all linked loans
Concentration impact analysis on portfolio-level metrics
Audit trail logging for all valuation changes

name: Loan Modification and Restructure
steps: Initiate modification request in Cornerstone > Lending > Modifications
Document reason for modification with borrower financial analysis
Propose revised terms: rate, term extension, payment schedule, collateral
Run modified cash flow analysis with new terms
Obtain required approvals per delegation of authority matrix
Execute modification agreement via Document Generation
Update all system records: amortization, rate, maturity, collateral links
Report modification to credit bureau and update TDR classification if applicable
systemChecks: TDR (Troubled Debt Restructure) classification assessment
Modified terms validation against rate sheet boundaries
Updated collateral coverage verification
Allowance impact recalculation
Regulatory reporting flag for modified loans

name: Delinquency and Watchlist Reporting
steps: Run Cornerstone > Reporting > Delinquency Aging daily at 06:00 CT
Categorize delinquent loans: 30-day, 60-day, 90-day, non-accrual
Auto-generate borrower contact queue for loan officers
Produce weekly watchlist summary for credit committee
Flag accounts approaching non-accrual threshold (90+ days)
Calculate delinquency ratios by sector, officer, and region
systemChecks: Payment due date accuracy validation
Grace period calculation per loan terms
Non-accrual transfer automation at 90-day threshold
Allowance adequacy trigger for deteriorating accounts
Board reporting threshold alerts
